'''sachotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackajack|crackajack]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackajack|crackajack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sachotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæchetheth|sæchetheth]] || [[word:sæchethej|sæchethej]] || [[word:sæchethesh|sæchethesh]] || [[word:sæchethe|sæchethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sachochothoth|sachochothoth]] || [[word:sachochothoj|sachochothoj]] || [[word:sachochothosh|sachochothosh]] || [[word:sachochotho|sachochotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sachothoth|sachothoth]] || [[word:sachothoj|sachothoj]] || [[word:sachothosh|sachothosh]] || [[word:sachotho|sachotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sachofthoth|sachofthoth]] || [[word:sachofthoj|sachofthoj]] || [[word:sachofthosh|sachofthosh]] || [[word:sachofthof|sachofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sachothotho|sachothotho]] || [[word:sachothojo|sachothojo]] || [[word:sachothosho|sachothosho]] || [[word:sachothoko|sachothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sachothoth|sachothoth]] || [[word:sachothoj|sachothoj]] || [[word:sachothosh|sachothosh]] || [[word:sachotho|sachotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sachothothol|sachothothol]] || [[word:sachothojol|sachothojol]] || [[word:sachothoshol|sachothoshol]] || [[word:sachothokol|sachothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sachothothotho|sachothothotho]] || [[word:sachothojojo|sachothojojo]] || [[word:sachothoshosho|sachothoshosho]] || [[word:sachothoko|sachothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sachothothon|sachothothon]] || [[word:sachothojon|sachothojon]] || [[word:sachothoshon|sachothoshon]] || [[word:sachothokon|sachothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sachothothoro|sachothothoro]] || [[word:sachothojoro|sachothojoro]] || [[word:sachothoshoro|sachothoshoro]] || [[word:sachothokoro|sachothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
